sections.label: Verse 1
lines: There’s a time to rise, a time to fall,
A time to build, a time to crawl.
A time to dance in golden light,
A time to weep through sleepless nights.
A time to plant, a time to reap,
A time to wake, a time to sleep.
A time to keep, a time to let go,
A time to learn what we don’t know.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Oh, turn, turn, turn again,
The tides will change, the storm will end.
Nothing stays, yet nothing’s lost,
Every moment knows its cost.
Oh, turn, turn, turn again,
The hands of time are heaven’s pen.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: A time to mend, a time to break,
A time to give, a time to take.
A time to love, a time to fight,
A time to see through different eyes.
A time to hold, a time to free,
A time for you, a time for me.
A time to whisper, a time to shout,
A time to know what life's about.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: A time for silence, a time for sound,
A time to wander, a time to be found.
A time for questions, a time to trust,
A time for diamonds made from dust.
A time for patience, a time for speed,
A time for hunger, a time to feed.
A time for doors that close so tight,
A time when darkness births the light.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: The sun will rise, the moon will wane,
The sky will clear after the rain.
No tear is wasted, no breath is vain,
Even the dark will shine again.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Oh, turn, turn, turn again,
The tides will change, the storm will end.
Nothing stays, yet nothing’s lost,
Every moment knows its cost.
Oh, turn, turn, turn again,
The hands of time are heaven’s pen.

sections.label: Outro
lines: So take a breath, embrace the flow,
The perfect time is all we know.
Oh, turn, turn, turn again…
Every season has its end.
